raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Remove the unused SpringApplicationBuilder instantiation that was not actually running the application context.
Catch I2CFactory.UnsupportedBusNumberException in addition to IOException to handle bus configuration errors gracefully.
Remove unnecessary intermediate variable assignment to directly return the method result.
Refactor MQTT client configuration to use MqttConnectOptions and pass password as char array to comply with API requirements.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Remove the explicit .web(false) configuration from SpringApplicationBuilder to rely on default detection or updated framework defaults.
Refactor MQTT client configuration to use MqttConnectOptions and convert password to char array to comply with API requirements.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the explicit .web(false) call from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ defaults where non-web applications are detected automatically.
Refactor MQTT client configuration to use MqttConnectOptions and convert password to char array to comply with Paho MQTT API requirements.
Remove commented-out code line for setting device in Pushover message builder.
Translate German error log message to English.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.human_impl: Changed `logger.error("Pushover Nachricht konnte nicht erstellt und versendet werden. ", e);` to `logger.error("could not create Pushover message. ", e);`

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Correct the text of the info log message to match the context or fix a typo (though the new text seems semantically incorrect for a success case, the intent is to change the message).
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.human_impl: Changed `logger.info("Pushover Nachricht wurde erfolgreich erstellt und versendet. {}", result.toString());` to `logger.info("could not create Pushover message: {}", result.toString());`

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project version from 1.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect new development cycle.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the project's target Java version from 8 to 11 to support modern language features and libraries.
Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 1.4.2.RELEASE to 2.4.5 to align with Java 11 requirements and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update Eclipse Paho MQTT client from 1.1.0 to 1.2.5 to fix connection issues and ensure compatibility.
Upgrade Pi4J core library from 0.0.5 to 1.4 to access newer Raspberry Pi hardware support features.
Remove the explicit Guava dependency as it is likely no longer directly used or is managed transitively.
Update Jackson Databind from 2.8.4 to 2.12.3 to improve JSON processing and security.
Increment the project artifact version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect significant updates.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 8 to 11 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 1.4.2.RELEASE to 2.4.5 to support Java 11 and modernize the framework stack.
Update Eclipse Paho MQTT client from 1.1.0 to 1.2.5 to fix connection issues and ensure compatibility.
Upgrade Google Guava from 19.0 to 30.1.1-jre to use a more recent version compatible with Java 11.
Update Google API Services OAuth2 library from v2-rev109-1.22.0 to v2-rev20200213-1.31.0.
Increment the project artifact version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT.
